entries.notes: Receipt-backed dispatch admission landed on main via #5514 and closed RS-07/#5327.

entries.notes: A2 admission-class productization for #7209: PR-1 landed via #7225 and was repaired by #7228. entries.title: A2 Productize rev-4 admission-class failures
